sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0

SELECT C.FOLDER_ID, C.FOLDER_NAME, IFNULL(D.COUNT, 0) AS COUNT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(C.REG_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT A.FOLDER_ID, A.FOLDER_NAME, A.REG_DATE FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMO B ON A.FOLDER_ID = B.FOLDER_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND A.USER_ID = #user_id# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND A.DELETE_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY A.FOLDER_ID ) C LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM TBL_MEMO D WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY FOLDER_ID) D ON C.FOLDER_ID = D.FOLDER_ID

SELECT USER_ID, FONT_SIZE, USE_DATE, USE_GADGET, DEFAULT_COLOR, COLOR_NAME, GADGET_RIGHT, GADGET_BOTTOM, LAYER_LEFT, LAYER_TOP, LAYER_WIDTH, LAYER_HEIGHT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_MEMO_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#

SELECT MEMO_ID, IFNULL(CONTENTS, '') AS CONTENTS, DISPLAY_FLAG, WRITE_DATE, ORDERS, COLOR_ID FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
AND CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchInput#), '%')
AND WRITE_DATE >= DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE) AND WRITE_DATE <= DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)
AND FOLDER_ID = #folder_id#
ORDER BY ORDERS
ORDER BY WRITE_DATE ASC
ORDER BY WRITE_DATE DESC
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ORDERS), '0') +1 FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID=#tenant_id#
SELECT MIN(FOLDER_ID) FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID=#tenant_id#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO (user_id, write_date, folder_id, orders, company_id, tenant_id, color_id) VALUES (#user_id#, #write_date#, #folder_id#, #orders#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #color_id#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET
USE_DATE = #use_date# , USE_GADGET = #use_gadget#
, FONT_SIZE = #font_size#
, layer_width = #layer_width#
, layer_height = #layer_height#
, layer_top = #layer_top#
, layer_left = #layer_left#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO_FOLDER (FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, REG_DATE, USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ICON_ID, ORDERS) VALUES (#folder_id#, #folder_name#, #reg_date#, #user_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, 1, #orders#)
SELECT MAX(FOLDER_ID)+1 FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME = #folder_name# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET CONTENTS = #contents#, WRITE_DATE = #write_date# WHERE MEMO_ID = #memo_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_memo_config (user_id, font_size, use_date, use_gadget, default_color, color_name, gadget_right, gadget_bottom, layer_left, layer_top, layer_width, layer_height, company_id, tenant_id) values (#user_id#, #font_size#, #use_date#, #use_gadget#, #default_color#, #color_name#, #gadget_right#, #gadget_bottom#, #layer_left#, #layer_top#, #layer_width#, #layer_height#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO_FOLDER (FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, REG_DATE, USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ORDERS, ICON_ID, DELETE_FLAG) VALUES (#folder_id#, #folder_name#, #reg_date#, #user_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #orders#, #icon_id#, #delete_flag#)
SELECT MAX(FOLDER_ID)+1 FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MEMO_ID, CONTENTS, USER_ID, DISPLAY_FLAG, WRITE_DATE, DELETE_DATE, ORDERS, FOLDER_ID, COLOR_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DISPLAY_FLAG = #display_flag# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(ORDERS)+1 FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
